MCRules.GeneralRules1: Mask Carnival is a 5-reel 4-row video slot featuring shifting reels and increasing multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

MCRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

MCCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all reels are shifted to the right with the rightmost reel being shifted out and an extra reel is added to the left.
MCCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MCCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.

MCMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
MCMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
MCMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: During any main game spin, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.

MCFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
MCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: During any main game spin, Scatter symbols are collected until the end of the main game spin.
MCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the end of a main game spin, 3 Scatter symbols will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x2.
MCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination4: During any free spin, the win multiplier increases by 2 for every extra reel added.
MCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination5: 1 free spin is awarded for each +1 symbol on the reels (if any).
